task.name: Lazy Scroll Capture
task.goal: Scroll a lazy-loaded page until content stabilizes and export the final DOM plus scroll history.

expected_outputs.html_path: Rendered HTML after lazy loading stabilizes

environment.profile_expectation: Uses shared browser-cli daemon profile handling.
browser_assumptions: Page grows scrollHeight while more content loads.

steps: Capture final rendered HTML and scroll history artifacts.
key_assertions: Scroll helper should stop only after consecutive stable rounds.

retryable_steps: Increase wait_seconds if the site loads content slowly.
recovery_hints.stale_ref_strategy: Not ref-dependent; retry the helper with updated waits.

output_interpretation_notes: scroll-rounds.json records each before/after height pair.
